'''Dantos Vigos''' was the [[Chief Medical Officer]] onboard the [[Pride of Selonia (Lancer-class)|''Pride of Selonia'']] during its missions to [[Galantos]], [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], [[Onadax]] and [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]]. Before the missions, he had [[8 ABY/Legends|two decades]] of service as a medical officer in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
